description: Our 2026 Subaru Crosstrek Premium AWD has carved out a name for itself with impressive capability in Crystal White Pearl! Powered by a 2.5 Liter BOXER 4 Cylinder serving up 182hp to a paddle-shifted CVT with an 8-speed manual mode for more control over the action. This All Wheel Drive SUV adds to the exhilaration with X-MODE and active torque vectoring, and it sees nearly 34mpg on the highway. Our Crosstrek's bold design is ready for attention with adaptive LED headlamps, fog lamps, robust body cladding, a rear roof spoiler, alloy wheels, a sunroof, and functional roof rails.  A thoughtful layout helps our Premium cabin meet your needs with comfortable cloth heated front seats, a multifunction steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, keyless entry, pushbutton ignition, and plenty of room for your gear. Drive confidently, knowing you can connect on demand with an 11.6-inch touchscreen, wireless Apple CarPlay®/Android Auto®, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth®, and a six-speaker audio system with HD Radio.  Safer driving is standard with Subaru's Eyesight features, which help protect you with automatic braking, emergency steering, adaptive cruise control, forward collision warning, lane-keeping assistance, hill start assistance, hill descent control, tire pressure monitoring, and more. You can say goodbye to the beaten path while driving our Crosstrek Premium! Save this Page and Call for Availability. Rear camera with washer preserves a clear view when backing up by cleaning the lens as needed, making reversing and parking simpler and safer in messy conditions.  Lane departure prevention helps keep the vehicle centered in its lane by taking corrective action if you begin to drift unintentionally, reducing the risk of lane-exit incidents.  Active blind spot system watches areas you cant easily see and helps prevent unsafe lane changes, giving added confidence when merging or passing in traffic.  Rear collision mitigation anticipates rear-impact threats and prepares both vehicle systems and occupants, aiming to lessen damage and increase occupant protection.  Adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go manages speed and following distance automatically, including bringing the vehicle to a stop and resuming in traffic, which eases highway and commuting stress. description: 2012 Ford F-350SD 4D Crew Cab Power Stroke 6.7L V8 DI 32V OHV Turbodiesel Green GemEngineered for uncompromising performance and built to handle the toughest tasks, the 2012 Ford F-350SD Crew Cab sets the standard for heavy-duty reliability. Its robust Power Stroke 6.7L V8 turbodiesel engine produces an impressive 400 horsepower and a staggering 800 lb-ft of torque, while the TorqShift 6-speed automatic transmission with overdrive delivers seamless shifts and maximum towing confidence. With four-wheel drive capability and a proven reputation for durability, this Super Duty stands as one of the most trusted choices for demanding commercial or recreational workloads. Estimated at 13 MPG city and 18 MPG highway, it provides remarkable power without sacrificing efficiency for its class.The exterior, finished in striking Green Gem, is set off by striking 18 bright machined 6-spoke alloy wheels, bold chrome bumpers, heated power mirrors with turn signal indicators, and a rear step bumper for added practicality. Inside, you'll discover premium black leather seating surfaces front bucket seats with power adjustment, a spacious rear seat with split folding, and a rear center armrest to accommodate both crew and cargo in first-class comfort. Dual-zone automatic climate control, rear window defroster, and a wealth of thoughtful features help ensure long drives remain pleasant and productive.Enjoy the immersive sound of a 9-speaker audio system, complemented by SiriusXM-ready AM/FM radio, a single CD/MP3 player, steering wheel-mounted audio controls, and a comprehensive radio data system. Technology and convenience abound with power windows and locks, a power passenger seat, auto-dimming rear-view mirror, trip computer, telescoping and tilt steering wheel, and an overhead console designed for easy organization and readiness.Advanced safety and control come standard. Traction control, four-wheel disc brakes with ABS, dual front and side-impact airbags, an overhead airbag, and a front anti-roll bar all work together to provide peace of mind on every trip, whether towing, hauling, or navigating challenging roads. The low tire pressure warning system and variably intermittent wipers further add to safe and reliable operation in all conditions.With thoughtful luxury touches like a leather-wrapped steering wheel, illuminated entry, front and rear reading lights, and both driver and passenger vanity mirrors, every aspect of this F-350SD underscores its superior build quality and attention to detail. Gain some space between you and the wheel with manual reclining driver seat. It lets you adjust the angle of the seatback for added comfort while you're driving, or for a more comfortable rest while you're pulled over. Settle in, with manual reclining driver seat. Power driver seat fore/aft adjustment - A touch forward? A touch more back? The choice is yours. Enjoying your drive begins with being comfortable in the driver's seat. With power driver seat fore/aft adjustment, you can find your perfect position to reach the steering wheel and pedals. Not only are you more comfortable, you're safer, too, with power driver seat with fore/aft adjustment.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Keypad activated door locks - The right combination. The most convenient way to get into your car is with keypad activated door locks. Simply punch in the combination to lock and unlock your doors, making it difficult to lock yourself out of your car. Keypad activated door locks is basic safety made easy.Powertrain and Mechanical Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same?  With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time. Performance with punch. A DOHC valvetrain produces more power and runs at a higher speed than standard OHV engines so you can get where you're going faster.Safety and Security Restricted driving mode - Know their limits. Giving up your keys doesn't mean giving up control when you have restricted driving mode. You can set limits on things like music volume and speed to reduce your stress and worry when someone else is using the vehicle. Whether it's your teen-aged driver or a valet, you can help ensure they're driving safely with restricted driving mode.  3.5L TI-VCT V6 ENGINE, INGOT SILVER METALLIC   At West Mitsubishi, we're here to Serve you! The certified 2026 Honda Passport TrailSport in Platinum White Pearl is a bold and capable midsize SUV that pairs rugged outdoor capability with refined style and everyday comfort. Finished in Platinum White Pearl, this Passport presents a clean, luminous exterior that highlights its muscular body lines and adventurous stance. The premium white finish gives the SUV a sharp, polished look  equally striking on city streets and off the beaten path  making it a perfect choice for drivers who want both versatility and presence.  From the front, the Passport TrailSport stands out with a rugged, purposeful design featuring a distinctive grille, aggressive bumper styling, and bold TrailSport badging that signals its off-road readiness. The SUVs wide stance, aerodynamic contours, and elevated ride height give it an assertive profile thats both athletic and practical. TrailSport-specific exterior touches such as blacked-out accents, all-terrain tires, and unique alloy wheels add to the vehicles adventurous aesthetic while offering real capability where the pavement ends.  Step inside the 2026 Honda Passport TrailSport, and youre welcomed by a spacious and thoughtfully designed interior crafted for both comfort and utility. The cabin offers generous seating for driver and passengers, with supportive seats that make every journey  from daily commutes to weekend excursions  comfortable and enjoyable. Quality materials and trail-worthy accents help create an interior atmosphere that feels premium yet rugged enough for active lifestyles.  The Passport TrailSports interior also includes smart storage solutions throughout the cabin to help keep your belongings organized. Deep center console bins, roomy door pockets, and useful cargo area compartments ensure you have plenty of space for gear, electronics, and everyday essentials. The rear cargo area is generous for the segment, with a wide opening and flat load floor that make loading and unloading luggage, sports equipment, or outdoor gear quick and easy.  Technology features are well integrated for both convenience and connectivity. A large, responsive touchscreen infotainment system keeps you connected to navigation, entertainment, and smartphone integration through Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Bluetooth connectivity and multiple USB ports help ensure that devices stay powered and connected on the go, while available features like wireless charging and a premium audio system add extra convenience and enjoyment to every drive.  Under the hood, the 2026 Honda Passport TrailSport offers a capable and responsive powertrain that delivers confident acceleration and strong performance in a variety of driving scenarios. Whether youre merging onto a highway, climbing a steep trail, or cruising over rugged terrain, this SUVs engine and drivetrain are engineered to handle it with confidence. TrailSport tuning enhances capability, with suspension calibrations and rugged components designed to deliver composed handling both on- and off-road.  Safety is a priority in the Passport TrailSport, and Honda equips this SUV with a suite of advanced driver-assist technologies designed to help enhance awareness and confidence on the road. Features like adaptive cruise control, lane-keeping assist, forward collision mitigation, blind-spot monitoring, and rear cross-traffic alert work together to support safer driving in everyday conditions as well as during longer journeys.  Overall, the 2026 Honda Passport TrailSport in Platinum White Pearl blends rugged capability, refined comfort, modern technology, and confident performance into one well-rounded SUV. Whether youre headed to work, embarking on a road trip, or tackling outdoor adventures, this Passport is engineered to support your lifestyle with versatility, style, and confidence  all wrapped in a Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. description: 2010 Hyundai Elantra SE  Regatta Blue exterior  Tan interior  2.0L I4 (138 hp / 136 lb-ft)  Under 37,000 miles  26 MPG city / 34 MPG highway  Clean CARFAX, one owner  Overview This 2010 Hyundai Elantra SE presents an outstanding combination of efficiency, comfort and value. Finished in Regatta Blue with a tan interior, this Elantra is in excellent overall condition and shows exceptionally low use  averaging under 3,000 miles per year and totaling less than 37,000 miles. Backed by a clean CARFAX and single-owner history, its a smart choice for anyone seeking a reliable, economical compact sedan with well-appointed factory equipment and a reputation for long-term dependability.  Powertrain and driving dynamics Under the hood is Hyundais durable 2.0-liter inline-4 engine, rated at 138 horsepower and 136 lb-ft of torque. This powerplant delivers a smooth, responsive driving experience for daily commuting, highway cruising and city errands alike. The engine is engineered for a balance of performance and efficiency, returning EPA-estimated fuel economy of approximately 26 MPG in city driving and 34 MPG on the highway  ideal for drivers seeking low operating costs. The Elantras chassis tuning prioritizes composed ride quality and predictable handling, with suspension calibration that smooths road imperfections while maintaining confident cornering stability.  Factory-standard features (detailed) This SE trim comes well-equipped from the factory with a comprehensive set of features that enhance comfort, convenience, connectivity and safety:  - Safety and crash protection: Factory-installed occupant protection includes front-impact airbags, front seat-mounted side-impact airbags and full-length side curtain airbags for both front and rear passengers. The structure incorporates crumple zones and reinforced occupant safety cell design. Additional safety-oriented equipment includes front seat active head restraints and child seat anchors (LATCH) for secure child seat installation.  - Braking and stability: The vehicle is equipped with a robust braking system designed for confident stopping performance in everyday driving. Anti-lock braking (ABS) and electronic brake-force distribution (EBD) were incorporated to improve control under heavy braking and varying load conditions. Tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS) helps maintain recommended inflation for safety and efficiency.  - Exterior features and lighting: Finished in attractive Regatta Blue, the exterior presents a contemporary, aerodynamic profile characteristic of the 2010 Elantras design. Body-colored door handles and mirrors create a coordinated appearance. Factory lighting includes multi-reflector headlamps and integrated rear combination taillamps that provide clear, reliable illumination and visibility.  - Wheels and tires: The SE trim includes factory wheels and well-matched tires selected to balance ride comfort with responsive steering. Tire and wheel specifications were chosen by Hyundai to provide predictable handling characteristics and efficient rolling resistance to support the vehicles fuel economy ratings.  - Interior comfort and seating: The tan cloth interior delivers a bright, welcoming cabin atmosphere. Seats are supportive and designed for extended comfort on longer drives; the rear seat features a 60/40 split-folding configuration to expand cargo versatility when needed. Adjustable driver seating helps accommodate a range of driver heights for an ergonomically comfortable driving position.  - Climate control and convenience: Manual climate control provides straightforward operation to maintain a comfortable cabin environment. Standard convenience features include power windows and power door locks, and an easy-to-reach tilt steering wheel to fine-tune driving ergonomics.  - Audio and connectivity: The factory audio system Earth MotorCars is Proud to offer this amazing: 2012 Ford Mustang Shelby 1000. 1 of 19 made.This 2012 Shelby 1000 S/C is a result of Carroll Shelbys idea to build a 1000 horsepower street race car in very limited production to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the 1962 Cobra. Finally in 2012, the production of this car proved viable. Initially it is reported that 50 cars were planned. According to Shelby America, there were two prototype/concept examples built, and then 19 production cars produced in 2012. Additionally, there were 4 produced in 2013 and 4 in 2014. This example is the third car built, and the first of the 19 production cars built in 2012 with Shelby Identification CSM2SM0003. These cars began as a new Shelby GT500 and transformed into the Shelby 1000R package, and are the last car designed by Carroll Shelby. In 2012, this conversion cost $154,999 plus car.This example has only 334 original miles and is finished in Race Red with Shelby 1000 graphics. It features a carbon-fiber hood, rear valance, front and rear spoilers, and rocker panels. HID headlights, hood vents, and polished exhaust outlets.It is powered by a hand-assembled 5.4-liter V8 was fitted with the following components as part of the Shelby 1000 S/C package: Shelby Kenne Bell liquid cooled supercharger with a revised inlet pipe and mass airflow meter, Shelby connecting rods, bearings, pistons, and rings, Shelby blower grind camshafts, Shelby Stage 3 ported cylinder heads, Revised valve springs and titanium retainers, Shelby oil pump and high-capacity oil pan, Shelby main and head studs, High-performance fuel pumps and injectors, American Racing exhaust headers and X-pipe and 3 inch Borla cat back exhaust. High-custom capacity cooling system. Power is sent to the rear wheels through a Tremec six-speed manual transmission and a Shelby-specification limited-slip 9 inch differential with a fluid cooler. Additional equipment fitted as part of the Shelby 1000 S/C package included a fabricated aluminum driveshaft with a safety loop along with a billet transmission support and a twin-disc clutch. Shelby-branded six-piston front and four-piston rear Wilwood calipers over slotted and drilled rotors. Suspension enhancements include a Shelby K-member, front controls arms, camber and caster plates, and a revised rear suspension. It rolls on Forged Shelby wheels 20x9 front, and 20x11 rear, mounted with Michelin Pilot Super Sport tires measuring 255/35 up front and 295/35 in the rear.The interior features Recaro front sport seats upholstered in Charcoal Black Leather with embroidered Shelby 1000 logos on the backrests. Coordinating rear seat and door panels. Black console, carpet and dash. Touchscreen infotainment, navigation, and dual-zone automatic climate control. Power windows, power door locks, cruise control, full and auxiliary gauges and a Shaker audio system. A plaque mounted ahead of the shifter displays a Carroll Shelby signature and a serial number of 12SM0003.All documentation, factory literature, production certificate, magazine articles and a car cover are included.The most powerful Shelby ever built, this is a rare opportunity for the first production Shelby 1000 that is fully documented and like new!We are not affiliated with the Manufacturer other than Lotus so we recommend that you contact your local franchise dealer to confirm options and warranty information. description: You'll have everyone looking twice when you pull up in our 2014 Lexus GX 460 4WD. Powered by a 4.6 Liter V8 that delivers 301hp while paired to the 6 Speed Automatic transmission that provides quick, smooth shifts. This Four Wheel Drive SUV offers ample performance, a towing capacity of 6,500lbs, and nearly 20mpg on the highway. Not often that luxury comes with adaptive suspension and crawl control, but Lexus has managed it in this 7-passenger SUV. Chiseled fenders, 18-inch alloy wheels, and a distinctive grille add to the imposing stance of the GX 460, making it impossible to ignore.   Once you open the door to our 460 and experience the ambiance of the sunroof while settling into ultra-supportive seats, you'll know you've found the sweet spot among style, substance, and sophistication. Rain-sensing wipers, an auto-dimming rearview mirror, a power-folding third-row seat, and dual-zone climate control make the daily routine happier. Your friends and family will enjoy this capable ride and the convenience of Bluetooth® audio/phone, satellite radio, and a fantastic sound system. With its smooth handling and responsive steering, you'll feel confident and in control behind the wheel.Don't miss your chance to own the 2014 Ram 1500. Powered by a responsive 2.0L Turbo I4 engine paired with an 8-speed shiftable automatic transmission, this rear-wheel drive SUV delivers both sporty handling and excellent fuel efficiency. Enjoy features like leatherette upholstery, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, automatic climate control, Bluetooth connectivity, and hands-free phone integration for a comfortable and connected ride. Safety is top-notch with front and rear side curtain airbags, tire pressure monitoring, traction and stability control, and child safety door locks. description: Discover the perfect blend of style, efficiency, and affordability with this 2014 Chevrolet Spark LS. This compact car is designed to make your daily commute a breeze while turning heads with its sleek, eye-catching exterior.  Packed with an impressive array of features, this Spark LS offers the perfect balance of convenience and performance. Enjoy the convenience of -  - Preferred Equipment Group 1SB - 4-Speaker System - AM/FM Stereo with Seek & Scan/Digital Clock - Air Conditioning - Power Windows - Traction Control - ABS Brakes - Dual Front Airbags - OnStar Directions & Connections  Under the hood, the ECOTEC 1.2L I4 MPI DOHC engine delivers an exceptional fuel economy of 30 MPG in the city and 39 MPG on the highway, making it an ideal choice for the eco-conscious driver. The Spark's responsive handling and nimble maneuverability make it a breeze to navigate through busy city streets and tight parking spaces.  Boasting a sleek blue exterior, this Spark LS exudes a modern and sophisticated style that is sure to turn heads wherever you go. The 15-inch 5-split spoke silver-painted aluminum wheels and body-color bumpers add a touch of refinement, while the rear window wiper and variable intermittent wipers ensure clear visibility in any weather.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior that prioritizes both comfort and convenience. The cloth seat trim, tilt steering wheel, and driver's folding armrest provide a relaxing and ergonomic driving experience, while the split-folding rear seat offers versatility for transporting larger items.  With its impressive features, exceptional fuel efficiency, and stylish good looks, this 2014 Chevrolet Spark LS is the perfect choice for the savvy driver who wants to enjoy the benefits of a compact car without sacrificing quality or value. This used 2014 Mercedes-Benz S-Class S 550 offers an exceptional blend of luxury, performance, and advanced technology, making it a standout choice for discerning drivers. With its sleek black exterior and plush Silk Beige/Espresso Brown interior, this sedan embodies elegance and sophistication. Powered by a robust 4.7-liter twin-turbo V8 engine delivering 449 horsepower and 516 lb-ft of torque, it provides effortless acceleration and refined highway cruising. The rear-wheel-drive layout ensures a dynamic driving experience, complemented by features like heated and leather seats, memory settings, a sunroof, and a rear sunshade for ultimate comfort. Modern safety and convenience technologies, including a backup camera, Bluetooth connectivity, fog lights, premium audio, navigation, push start, and xenon headlights, enhance daily driving while adding a touch of class.This used Mercedes-Benz S-Class is equipped with an array of premium features designed to elevate your driving experience. The large 12.3-inch infotainment screen offers real-time traffic data, HD radio, a 5.1 surround sound system with 14 speakers, and dual subwoofers, providing immersive entertainment on the go. In-dash DVD audio and a 6-disc CD changer add to the convenience, while voice-activated hands-free phone calls ensure seamless connectivity. With satellite radio ready, youll enjoy endless entertainment options, all housed within a luxurious, meticulously maintained package. This used S 550 combines cutting-edge technology with comfort and style, making it a compelling choice for those seeking a refined driving experience.2014 Mercedes-Benz S-Class Safety and Security FeaturesThis used Mercedes-Benz S-Class prioritizes safety with sophisticated features including a night vision enhancement system that provides enhanced visibility in low-light conditions. It is equipped with knee airbags for the driver, front active head restraints, and comprehensive parking sensors at both front and rear to assist with maneuvering. The vehicle also includes four-wheel ABS for reliable stopping power, emergency braking preparation, and auto-locking power door locks for added security. Brake drying technology further enhances braking performance in wet conditions, ensuring peace of mind on every journey.2014 Mercedes-Benz S-Class Entertainment and Technology FeaturesThe entertainment and technology package in this used S 550 is equally impressive, centered around a 12.3-inch infotainment display with real-time traffic updates. The system boasts a 14-speaker surround sound setup with 600 watts of power, complemented by two subwoofers and HD radio for crystal-clear audio quality. In-dash DVD audio and a 6-disc CD changer offer versatile media options, while voice-operated hands-free calling maintains connectivity without distraction. Navigation data includes live traffic information, making every drive smooth and efficient. This combination of advanced entertainment and connectivity features creates an immersive, luxury driving environment.2014 Mercedes-Benz S-Class Performance FeaturesPerformance in this used Mercedes-Benz S-Class is driven by advanced suspension technology designed for supreme comfort and handling. The vehicle features an air suspension system with electronic suspension control, allowing the driver to adjust ride height and firmness to suit driving conditions. Pneumatic rear and front springs work in harmony to deliver a smooth, controlled ride, whether cruising on the highway or navigating city streets. The driver can enjoy a customizable driving experience, combining luxury and performance through sophisticated suspension management that ensures stability, comfort, and responsiveness at all description: Discover the thrill of driving a true sports car with this stunning 2015 Porsche Cayman Base. This mid-engine coupe is a masterpiece of engineering, blending exceptional performance, precise handling, and timeless Porsche design.  - Carmine Red exterior - Power Steering Plus - Heated door mirrors - Spoiler - Wheel Centers w/Full-Color Porsche Crest - Wheels: 8J x 18" Fr & 9J x 18" Rr Cayman Alloy  Powered by a potent 2.7L H6 DOHC engine mated to a smooth 6-Speed Manual transmission, this Cayman delivers an exhilarating driving experience. With 22 city and 32 highway MPG, you'll enjoy the perfect balance of power and efficiency.  Beyond its captivating performance, this Cayman is packed with premium features that elevate the driving experience. Indulge in the comfort of the 2-Way Electric Sport Seats, the convenience of the Garage door transmitter, and the refined ambiance of the Leather Shift Knob and Steering Wheel. The advanced technology, including the CDR Audio System with CD/MP3 player and Radio Data System, keeps you connected and entertained.  The Cayman's legendary chassis and suspension provide unparalleled agility and control, allowing you to carve through corners with confidence. The 4-Wheel Disc Brakes with ABS and Electronic Stability Control ensure exceptional stopping power and stability, while the Four Wheel Independent Suspension delivers a smooth, responsive ride.  Safety is also a top priority, with the Cayman's comprehensive suite of airbags, including dual front and side impact airbags, as well as the Occupant Sensing Airbag system. The Low Tire Pressure Warning and Brake Assist features add an extra layer of protection and peace of mind.  This 2015 Porsche Cayman Base is a rare find, blending the brand's renowned performance pedigree with a wealth of premium features and amenities. Experience the thrill of Porsche ownership and schedule a test drive today. description: Discover the perfect blend of capability, comfort, and style in this 2015 Subaru Forester 2.5i Premium. With its impressive all-wheel-drive performance, efficient 2.5L 4-cylinder engine, and a wealth of premium features, this Forester is ready to elevate your driving experience.  Boasting a sleek white exterior, this Forester is not only visually appealing but also comes equipped with a host of desirable amenities:  - Fully Detailed - Bluetooth Connectivity - Backup Camera - Auto-Dimming Mirror Compass - Splash Guard Kit - Rear Seat Back Protector - Rear Bumper Cover - Cargo Tray - All Weather Floor Mats  Beneath the hood, the Forester's 2.5L 4-cylinder DOHC 16V VVT engine, paired with a smooth Lineartronic CVT, delivers an impressive balance of power and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 24 MPG in the city and 32 MPG on the highway.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior, featuring 6 speakers, an AM/FM stereo with CD player, and a rear window defroster. The power driver's seat and steering wheel-mounted audio controls provide added convenience, while the four-wheel independent suspension and 4-wheel disc brakes ensure a confident and responsive driving experience.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, a knee airbag, and electronic stability control keeping you and your passengers secure.  Whether you're commuting, running errands, or embarking on an adventure, this 2015 Subaru Forester 2.5i Premium is ready to meet your needs. The 2015 Mazda5 Touring is designed for those who appreciate the joy of driving while also being practical. With a peppy 2.5L DOHC 16-Valve I4 engine, it delivers a spirited 157 horsepower at 6000 rpm, ensuring that every journey is filled with excitement.    This versatile vehicle features front-wheel drive, making it responsive and easy to handle on various road conditions.
